subcodes.first_line: Praise be befitting and meet unto the Eternal Beloved, Whose all-encompassing mercy hath preceded all created things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد محبوب بیزوالی را لایق و سزا است که رحمت محیطه اش کل ممکنات را سبقت
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @prophecy and fulfillment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation
